sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107843" key="u(perri/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερρίπτω</orth>, <sense id="n107843.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throw</tr_> the arm <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">over</tr_> a cross-bar, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0660.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollon.Cit.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
